3171770.name: CosmicBreak Universal 「シエス」 ファンパック
3171770.description:
CosmicBreak Universal is now offering a delightful item pack especially for C.S.'s fans!

A must-have for all C.S. enthusiasts, this DLC includes the C.S. and C.S.-Chan robots, as well as DLC limited themed accessories, titles, and other useful items like Gacha Tickets and Boost Items!

Pack Contents (Robot)
  • C.S.
  • C.S.-Chan

Pack Contents (Parts)
  • C.S. Rucksack BS（x1）
  • C.S. Print Fan（x1）
  • Title [C.S. Fan♪]（x1）

Pack Contents (Other)
  • 100 Rt
  • SP Garapon Ticket（x5）
  • Cosmo Harmonics 20%（x30）
  • Tune-Up Set 10（x5）
  • ALL×3 Ticket 1h（x3）

※Purchase of this Pack is limited to one per account.
※[SP Garapon Tickets] allow players to roll the Garapon in the Shop.
※The Zero Saber visible in the screenshot is not included in this Pack.
3171770.supported_languages:
英语, 日语*, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
